profile.current_question: I want to change career direction, but I keep delaying the decision.
self_description: I always want to prove myself.
I am afraid of choosing the wrong path.
I can analyze my problems clearly, but I often do not act.
In relationships I often say I am fine even when I am not.

recent_events.text: A new opportunity appeared, but it requires leaving a stable environment.
A close friend said I always disappear when pressure becomes real.

social_roles.description: Stable job, but growth feels limited.
Family expects stability and dislikes risky career changes.
Often plays the listener in friendships.

family_system.unspoken_family_rule: Do not make risky choices unless success is almost guaranteed.

observer_feedback: A close friend says I disappear when pressure becomes real.

life_timeline.text: The first time I felt truly seen was after being praised for excellent performance.
I made a wrong choice once and felt ashamed for a long time.
I entered a stable job, but later felt the role protected me and trapped me at the same time.

value_system.value_conflict: I want freedom, but I also need safety and family permission.

decision_style.risk_response: over-prepare and seek recognition before acting
decision_style.best_intervention: small public experiment with external feedback

social_capital.missing_network: people already living the future identity I want

intimacy_and_family_path.private_life_need: relationships where I do not need to perform

wealth_path.asset_building_path: turn writing, product thinking, and AI tool usage into public artifacts

macro_era.market_window: small shipped artifacts can create new proof faster than old credentials

names.label: FormSight
names.meaning: seeing a life pattern before being trapped by it

places.label: Shanghai
places.meaning: a dense field of opportunity, comparison, and public evaluation

objects.label: unfinished notebook
objects.meaning: an open loop between planning and visible action

digital_identities.label: public portfolio identity
digital_identities.meaning: a possible second identity beyond the stable employee role

unfinished_artifacts.label: half-built portfolio
unfinished_artifacts.meaning: ability exists but has not yet become social proof

long_texts: I keep returning to the idea that I need a visible artifact before I can believe I have changed. The room, the notebook, the deadline, and the public portfolio all feel connected: I want a new identity, but I keep waiting for enough certainty before I show anything.

desired_future: relationships where I do not need to perform
feared_future: being seen as not good enough
